summary: Iteration 81 - Cooperative Dashboard UI/UX Redesign Testing Complete. All frontend features verified successfully. Dashboard loads correctly after login, all 10 modular components are working, navigation buttons function properly, Quick Actions panel is organized by categories, USSD Simulator toggles correctly, and responsive layout works on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Dashboard loads successfully when logged in as admin (klenakan.eric@gmail.com)
PASS: Dashboard Header shows cooperative name ('Cooperative'), code ('N/A'), and navigation buttons (Accueil, Profil, Ajouter Membre)
PASS: KPI Strip shows 4 metric cards (Membres Actifs, Superficie Totale, CO₂ Capturé, Primes à Distribuer) with colored top borders
PASS: KPI card borders use correct colors: green (#1A3622), gold (#D4AF37), terracotta (#C25E30)
PASS: Quick Actions Panel is organized by 4 categories: Exploitation, Commerce, Carbone & REDD+, Conformité
PASS: Quick Actions USSD Simulator button (dark background #111827) toggles the USSD simulator panel
PASS: USSD Panel opens with simulator interface and 'Comment utiliser' instructions
PASS: Activation Widget displays stats (Total, Activés, En attente, PIN, Code Planteur) with progress bar
PASS: Parcels Section shows parcel stats and action buttons (Enregistrer, Toutes les Parcelles, Vérification, Rapport EUDR)
PASS: Financial Summary shows Primes Reçues, Distribué, En Attente values in FCFA
PASS: Recent Members card shows empty state with 'Aucun membre recent' message
PASS: Commission card shows 10% rate with edit capability (edit form opens/closes correctly)
PASS: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
PASS: Responsive layout: 12-column grid (8+4) on desktop, stacked on mobile (390x844)
PASS: Navigation buttons work correctly - Home (/) , Profile (/profile), Add Member (/cooperative/members/new)
PASS: Quick action buttons navigate to correct routes (Membres -> /cooperative/members, Parcelle -> /cooperative/parcels/new)
PASS: Design theme colors verified - bone white background (#FAF9F6), deep forest green header (#1A3622)
PASS: Text contrast is good - white text on dark green header
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified the complete UI/UX redesign of the Cooperative Dashboard. The dashboard was refactored from a 920-line monolithic file into 10 modular components. All components are working correctly: DashboardHeader, KPIStrip, QuickActionsPanel, RecentMembersCard, ActivationWidget, ParcelsSection, FinancialCard, CommissionCardNew, USSDPanel, AlertsBanner. The design uses the Organic & Earthy theme with deep forest green (#1A3622), bone white (#FAF9F6), gold (#D4AF37), and terracotta (#C25E30). All text is in French. The cooperative name shows as 'Cooperative' and code as 'N/A' because the admin user doesn't have coop_name/coop_code set - this is expected behavior.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

AlertsBanner.status: PASS (not visible when no pending validation)
